gems.name: Banded Shaleite
gems.color: Layered grey, rust-brown, and dull white

gems.name: Sulphur Agate
gems.color: Pale yellow with smoky grey veins

gems.name: Tidal Jasper
gems.color: Dark teal-green with wave-like brown markings

gems.name: Ironbloom Stone
gems.color: Dark red to charcoal grey

gems.name: Marshite
gems.color: Murky green with black inclusions

gems.name: Ash Chalcedony
gems.color: Pale grey with faint white streaks

gems.name: Copperstone
gems.color: Bright verdigris-green with blue-grey patches

gems.name: Dustfire Opal
gems.color: Dull orange deepening to brown at edges

gems.name: Snowveil Obsidian
gems.color: Deep black with pale grey fracture patterns

gems.name: Violet Slate
gems.color: Muted purple to deep blue-grey

gems.name: Tiger Flint
gems.color: Rich tawny-brown with golden ripple lines

gems.name: Seafoam Agate
gems.color: Sky blue to grey-green, sometimes mottled

gems.name: Hearthstone
gems.color: Dark green with scattered crimson speckles

gems.name: Sunvein Carnelian
gems.color: Warm amber-orange to deep terracotta

gems.name: Verdant Prase
gems.color: Pale to vivid apple-green

gems.name: Goldhaze Citrine
gems.color: Clear yellow deepening to amber at the core

gems.name: Dusk Iolite
gems.color: Deep blue-violet, shifting to grey in low light

gems.name: Bloodbanded Jasper
gems.color: Deep red-brown with irregular yellow stripes

gems.name: Pallid Moonstone
gems.color: Colourless to white with a soft blue inner glow

gems.name: Ink Onyx
gems.color: Deep black to dark brown, occasionally dark green

gems.name: Olive Chrysolite
gems.color: Yellowish-green to warm olive

gems.name: Clear Rockglass
gems.color: Perfectly colourless

gems.name: Russet Sardonyx
gems.color: Reddish-brown with alternating black and cream bands

gems.name: Sandfire Zircon
gems.color: Light honey-brown to reddish, sometimes colourless or blue

gems.name: Golden Ambrite
gems.color: Warm yellow to deep orange, occasionally blood-red or pale green

gems.name: Violet Amethine
gems.color: Deep purple, sometimes lavender at the facet edges

gems.name: Chrysoverde
gems.color: Rich yellow-green to forest green

gems.name: Crimson Coralite
gems.color: Pink to vivid crimson

gems.name: Deepfire Garnet
gems.color: Dark orangish-brown to deep wine-red or greenish

gems.name: Shadow Jade
gems.color: Dark green to near-black, occasionally white or pale lavender

gems.name: Obsidian Pearl
gems.color: Lustrous white, gold, or pale rose; rarely silver-grey

gems.name: Bloodspinel
gems.color: Deep red to blackish-red; rarely vivid green

gems.name: Aurora Tourmaline
gems.color: Pale blue-green, dusty rose, or pale amber

gems.name: Ember Jet
gems.color: Solid deep black with a faint internal warmth

gems.name: Starfire Diamond
gems.color: Colourless, with exceptional inner brilliance

gems.name: Bloodsea Ruby
gems.color: Deep pigeon-blood red to vivid crimson

gems.name: Abyssal Sapphire
gems.color: Velvety midnight blue, occasionally violet or pale blue

gems.name: Verdant Emerald
gems.color: Vivid green to rich forest green

gems.name: Golden Topaz
gems.color: Rich imperial yellow to warm orange-gold

gems.name: Pale Alexandrite
gems.color: Green in daylight, shifting to rose-red in firelight

gems.name: Sea-Eye Aquamarine
gems.color: Clear pale blue to deep ocean blue-green

gems.name: Dawnfire Opal
gems.color: White to black base, blazing with shifting red, gold, and green fire

placements.text: set into the eye sockets of a stone idol
embedded in the pommel of an ornate sword lying on the floor
resting in a shallow bowl on a stone altar
inlaid into the carved forehead of a relief carving on the wall
dangling from a tarnished chain hung on a rusted hook
set into the crown of a crumbling stone effigy
scattered among the bones of a long-dead figure
resting inside an open wooden coffer, still intact
pressed into the wax seal of a rolled document on a shelf
worked into the face of a ceremonial shield mounted on the wall
lodged in a crack in the floor, partially hidden by grime
tucked behind a loose stone near the base of the wall
concealed inside a hollowed-out book spine on a neglected shelf
wedged between two ceiling stones, invisible from below without a light source
sealed inside a dried lump of old wax on a candelabra
embedded in thick mortar that has partially crumbled, revealing it only on close inspection
wrapped in a scrap of rotted cloth stuffed into a crevice
hidden inside a false-bottomed brass urn near the door
wedged between the toes of a stone statue, invisible unless the base is examined
pressed flat under the corner of a heavy stone slab
worked into the eye of a serpent carved into a pillar
resting in the folded hands of a skeletal corpse seated against the wall
hanging from the ear of a decorative brass mask mounted near the entrance
balanced on the rim of a dry stone fountain
set into the hilt-guard of a dagger driven into the floor
mortared into a wall niche beside a burned-out torch sconce
hidden inside the remains of a small clay figurine on a shelf
glinting faintly inside a pool of hardened black tallow beneath an overturned candle stand
tucked into the lining of a rotted leather satchel hanging from a peg
resting in the eye sockets of a skull used as a decorative ornament
inlaid along the spine of a stone relief depicting a coiling serpent or dragon
sewn into the hem of a tattered ceremonial robe hanging on a wooden frame
